title: arnica angustifolia subsp. iljinii
intro: Arnica angustifolia subsp. iljinii, a subspecies of the Arnica angustifolia plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae, and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and promote tissue repair. The health benefits of Arnica angustifolia subsp. iljinii include its ability to aid in the recovery from injuries and surgeries, reduce bruising and swelling, and alleviate muscle and joint pain. Arnica angustifolia subsp. iljinii can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or ointment, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
